# Polymarket Top Markets — Snapshot 2026-05-13

Point-in-time snapshot of the Polymarket Popular Predictions page (`polymarket.com/predictions`), captured 2026-05-13. **20 visible market cards** with total volume, 24-hour volume, liquidity, leading outcome, and leading odds at the moment of capture. Active subcategory tabs displayed at top of page: `Sports | Politics | Awards | Crypto | Basketball | Esports | League Of Legends | Iran | Weather | Music`.

**Do not edit this page for live updates.** A new dated snapshot page should be created for each capture. Source: `raw/research/polymarket-market-content-and-sizing/03-polymarket-predictions.md`.

## Top markets by total all-time volume (this snapshot)

1. **Democratic Presidential Nominee 2028 — $1B** (Gavin Newsom 24%; >2 years to resolution)
2. **2026 FIFA World Cup Winner — $963M** with $215M liquidity (France 18%; ends in ~2 months)
3. **Presidential Election Winner 2028 — $579M** (JD Vance 19%; >2 years)
4. **2026 NBA Champion — $381M** (Oklahoma City Thunder 61%; ~2 months)

## Top markets by 24-hour volume (this snapshot)

1. Politics/Trump (Trump visits China) — $9M
2. Sports/Soccer (FIFA WC Winner) — $8M
3. Culture/Awards (Eurovision) — $6M
4. Crypto/Bitcoin ("When will Bitcoin hit $150k?") — $6M
5. Finance/Fed (Fed Chair) — $4M

## Structural observations on the snapshot

- **Mega-event liquidity concentration.** FIFA WC has **$215M liquidity** — an order of magnitude larger than NBA Champion ($2M) and Eurovision ($9M). Liquidity does not track 24-hour volume linearly: FIFA's $8M 24h vol on $215M liq is a turnover ratio of ~3.7%/day; Eurovision's $6M / $9M is ~67%/day. Different operating regimes — FIFA is institutional-depth, Eurovision is event-cycle retail churn.
- **Near-resolved 100% markets.** Trump-visits-China (#1, $49M, May 31), Trump-visits-China-on-May-13 (#14, $5M, May 13), Fed Chair Kevin Warsh confirmation (#5, $61M, ~6 months), LoL T1 (#8, $2M, ~3 hours), Bitcoin above 72K on May 13 (#10, $2M, ~5 hours) all read 100% Yes. Two near-identical Trump-China markets running simultaneously with different resolution windows ($49M and $5M) is a structural pattern worth noting — same underlying event, different expiry contracts.
- **Mention markets as recurring weekly series.** Three overlapping Elon Musk tweet-count markets simultaneously live at capture: May 8–15, May 12–19, May 11–13 windows; combined **$12M** at capture. Confirms the recurring-cadence series pattern documented in [[mention-markets]] for Trump weekly speeches, JRE first-of-week, MrBeast YouTube, etc.
- **Multi-outcome events dominate the largest contracts.** FIFA, Eurovision, NBA Champion, Democratic Nominee 2028, Presidential Winner 2028 are all multi-outcome event containers (per [[polymarket-market-taxonomy]]'s grouped-event definition). The cards display the *leading* outcome's odds — not the full distribution.
- **Esports with same-day resolution shows 100% turnover.** Markets #8 and #20 (LoL matches) both show 24h volume ≈ total volume — pure intraday flow with no overnight carry. Operating regime: spread-capture + directional bet, no holding period.
- **Brier 0.0843 self-claim.** The page's FAQ states Polymarket aggregate Brier = 0.0843 across all resolved markets, with accuracy >90% one month out and >96% within four hours. Self-reported — methodology not disclosed (which markets included, how accuracy binarised). Materially better than the superforecaster Brier 0.15–0.20 benchmark in [[llm-epistemic-calibration]] if accurate. Treat as high-prior-credibility unverified.
